SEARCH

Package Cataphract.API

package Cataphract.API
The API package contains all essential programs that helps in the functioning of Cataphract correctly. 
 These programs are independent modules or are designed to just return a value. These programs can be called
 by other kernels as specified in the Nion Directory Specification and Nion Kernel Specification, present in the
 EasyGuide documentation.

 Important links can be found here:

 https://dak404.github.io/Cataphract
Since:
v0.0.1 (10-April-2020, Zen Quantum)
Version:
v1.0.0 (11-October-2023, Cataphract)
Author:
DAK404 (https://github.com/DAK404)

    Package
    Description
    Cataphract.API.Astaroth
     
    Cataphract.API.Dragon
    The Dragon packge contains all essential utilities to manage user accounts.
    Cataphract.API.Minotaur
    The Minotaur package contains tools relating to policy management and cryptography for checking hashes for files and literals.

  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    Anvil
    A class that provides a set of built in commands for all classes.
    Build
    A class to display the build information and clear the screen.
    ExceptionHandler
    A class to handle exceptions and log error details.
    IOStreams
    A class implementing console output with prefixes, colors, and a "Press RETURN To Continue" functionality
